title: The Arena Collection by Sonus Faber
bodyHtml:
The Arena Collection: Precision, Power, and Italian Pride

Arena is a system designed to bring cinematic sound into the home with scale and control. It delivers powerful dynamics with clarity, allowing you to hear every detail without overwhelming your space.

‍

‍

The foundation of Arena lies in its subwoofer design. Sonus faber has created a structure that manages bass with control and depth. Dialogue stays intelligible. Low frequencies remain present without distortion. Action has weight without muddying the rest of the soundtrack.

Each speaker is built by hand in Vicenza. The construction is solid and intentional. Materials are chosen for their acoustic performance and longevity. No plastic. No unnecessary flourishes. Just honest craftsmanship with a purpose.

‍

‍

Installation is clean and simple. The new bracket system allows Arena speakers to mount flush with the wall. If you prefer a concealed look, there are grille options that preserve both sound and appearance. Frames are adjustable to accommodate different finishes and placements.

The speakers are designed to complement your space rather than compete with it. Yet the presence of Arena is unmistakable. These are not background speakers. They bring presence and scale without harshness.

With 400 to 600 watts of power output, Arena is capable of high-volume performance without stress. Whether you are watching a film or listening to music, the sound remains natural and consistent.

Arena does not force a tradeoff between aesthetics and performance. It is a system that respects both.

‍
